headline: J.P. Morgan Called a Potential Elon Musk SpaceX-Tesla Merger "Strategically Coherent"
summary: J.P. Morgan just outlined why a SpaceX-Tesla merger could make strategic sense on paper. It also got into why investors shouldn't mistake that for a likely deal.

headline: Big banks kick off Q2 earnings, June CPI offers inflation insights: What to watch this week
summary: Yahoo Finance's Brooke DiPalma takes a closer look at the top stories for investors to watch this week, including the latest CPI reading and quarterly earnings reports from Netflix (NFLX), Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM), JPMorgan (JPM), Bank of America (BAC), Wells Fargo (WFC), Goldman Sachs (GS), Citigroup (C), and Morgan Stanley (MS).

headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Says Its AI Agents Beat 60 40 Portfolios In Backtests
summary: JPMorgan Chase reports that its AI investment agents have consistently outperformed traditional asset allocation models in 20 years of historical backtests. The AI agents exceeded the classic 60/40 stock bond portfolio on both returns and volatility, according to the bank's internal research. The findings point to a possible shift in how large institutions might build and manage portfolios using AI driven tools. For investors tracking NYSE:JPM, this AI research comes as the stock trades...
